industries.name: Data Center & Colocation Services
industries.description: Operation of data center facilities providing server colocation, rack space, power, cooling and bandwidth to enterprise tenants.

industries.name: Automotive Components Manufacturing
industries.description: Manufacture of automotive components such as powertrain, chassis, braking and interior assemblies supplied to vehicle OEMs.

industries.name: Semiconductor Foundry
industries.description: Fabrication of integrated circuits on silicon wafers using photolithography and etch process nodes.

industries.name: Lithium-ion Battery Manufacturing
industries.description: Manufacture of lithium-ion cells with cathode and anode chemistries for electric vehicles and consumer electronics.

industries.name: Solar Photovoltaic Manufacturing
industries.description: Production of crystalline silicon photovoltaic cells and modules for solar power generation.

industries.name: Biologics Pharmaceutical Manufacturing
industries.description: Development and manufacture of biologic drugs such as monoclonal antibodies using mammalian cell culture and bioreactors.

industries.name: Telecommunications Equipment
industries.description: Manufacture of telecommunications infrastructure such as base stations, routers and optical transport for carrier networks.

industries.name: Petroleum Refining
industries.description: Refining of crude oil into fuels and petrochemical feedstocks via distillation, cracking and reforming.
